=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 4.0.0

/.src/test.ts(1,1): warning TS377051: Multiple versions of package `my-effect-lib` were detected: 1.0.0 @ /node_modules/my-effect-lib, 2.0.0 @ /node_modules/wrapper/node_modules/my-effect-lib. Package duplication can change runtime identity and type equality across Effect modules.
If this is intentional, set the LSP config `allowedDuplicatedPackages` to ["my-effect-lib"]. effect(duplicatePackage)


==== /.src/tsconfig.json (0 errors) ====
    {
      "compilerOptions": {
        "plugins": [
          {
            "name": "@effect/language-service"
          }
        ]
      }
    }
    

==== /.src/test.ts (1 errors) ====
    import { Effect } from "effect"
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377051: Multiple versions of package `my-effect-lib` were detected: 1.0.0 @ /node_modules/my-effect-lib, 2.0.0 @ /node_modules/wrapper/node_modules/my-effect-lib. Package duplication can change runtime identity and type equality across Effect modules.
If this is intentional, set the LSP config `allowedDuplicatedPackages` to ["my-effect-lib"]. effect(duplicatePackage)
    import { foo } from "my-effect-lib"
    import { bar } from "wrapper"
    
    const program = Effect.succeed(foo + bar)
